name: Google Cloud
description: Google Cloud is Google's enterprise cloud computing platform offering compute, storage, networking, data analytics, AI/ML, and managed services across global regions.

years.notes: Four-colour cloud silhouette introduced with the September 2016 'Google Cloud' rebrand, replacing the 2014 multicoloured isometric-hexagon 'Google Cloud Platform' mark. Icon redrawn to a 24×24 viewBox (transform=scale(0.375) over the native 64×64 source) and palette uses the canonical Google brand quartet.

notes: Pre-2016 'Google Cloud Platform' millésime (2014 multicoloured isometric hexagonal cube logo) was not added: no authoritative true-vector SVG of the standalone cube mark exists on Google's brand resource centre, Wikimedia Commons, or archive.org. Available third-party SVGs (BrandEPS, gist-hosted Inkscape exports, etc.) either ship the wrong palette (#547DBF/#FFCE40/#DB4436) or are PNG-trace reconstructions. Per the no-invent rule the 2014 millésime was skipped. The 2022 typographic refresh did not alter the cloud icon, so no separate 2022 entry is warranted.
